name: agent-skills
description: Agent Skills Marketplace — Git platform assistant, exam generator, browser automation, and programming assistants

plugins.name: gitwork
plugins.description: Git platform development assistant — deliver, review, resolve, and conflict skills combined with gh / glab CLI for GitHub and GitLab project delivery

plugins.name: exam-generator
plugins.description: Exam generator from knowledge bases — supports multiple question types, LaTeX rendering, and PDF export

plugins.name: playwright-cli
plugins.description: Browser automation using playwright-cli — web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction

plugins.name: mimo
plugins.description: Programming assistant — code review, task delegation, and stop-gate review using MiMo

plugins.name: remora
plugins.description: Self-contained task agent — embeds pi agent harness, uses non-Claude models for cross-validation and second opinions, no third-party CLI required
